product_overview: AI Finance Ops Copilot is a financial operations dashboard that consolidates revenue, cash flow, subscriptions, and banking data across payment providers and bank connections. It helps SaaS founders and finance teams track performance and monitor financial activity from one place.
core_goals: Review consolidated revenue and cash flow from multiple providers
Connect payment and bank accounts to centralize financial data
Analyze MRR, transactions, invoices, and subscription activity
Manage account settings and integrations from the dashboard

features.name: Marketing Homepage
features.description: Public landing page that introduces the product, highlights key capabilities, and presents pricing information.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the hero section with animated counters -> Scroll through the featured logos bar -> Browse the features section -> Read customer testimonials -> View the pricing comparison table

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to sign up, log in, and access their authenticated session through Supabase Auth.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Enter email and password -> Submit the registration form -> Complete account creation -> Redirect to the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an authentication error message

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Shows high-level financial KPIs for connected providers in a single overview page.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/overview -> View revenue KPI summaries -> View PayPal balance and transaction stats -> Observe dashboard data loading
Navigate to /dashboard/overview -> View an error state for a data section -> Retry loading the data -> See the KPI grid update

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Provides tabbed analytics views for core metrics, Lemon Squeezy, and PayPal with charts and tables.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> View the core analytics tab -> Review the revenue line chart -> Review the transaction status donut chart -> Review the top payers bar chart
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> Switch to the PayPal analytics tab -> View transaction and invoice data -> Paginate through the transactions table
Navigate to /dashboard/analytics -> Switch between the Core, Lemon Squeezy, and PayPal tabs -> Compare the available analytics views

features.name: Cash Flow
features.description: Displays cash flow and recurring revenue information across the supported financial providers.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/cashflow -> View monthly recurring revenue -> View lifetime net revenue -> View subscription MRR
Navigate to /dashboard/cashflow -> Review the PayPal cash flow section -> Compare cash flow values across providers

features.name: Settings & Integrations
features.description: Lets users manage profile, workspace, notification, security, and connected financial integrations.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to the Profile tab -> Update the profile name -> Save changes
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to the Workspace tab -> Update company details and billing email -> Save changes
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to the Notifications tab -> Toggle notification preferences -> Save changes
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Switch to the Integrations tab -> Connect or disconnect supported integrations -> Return to the settings view

features.name: Plaid Bank Integration
features.description: Enables users to connect a bank account through Plaid and manage the linked connection.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Open the bank connection flow -> Select a financial institution -> Enter bank credentials -> Authorize account access -> Return to settings and see the connected bank
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Open the bank connection flow -> Cancel during institution selection -> Return without connecting an account
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Disconnect the bank account -> See the bank connection removed from settings

features.name: PayPal Business Integration
features.description: Lets users connect a PayPal Business account, validate credentials, sync data, and disconnect when needed.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Enter PayPal Client ID and Secret -> Choose Sandbox or Live mode -> Test the connection and connect the account -> Return to settings with PayPal connected
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Trigger a transaction sync -> Wait for the sync to complete -> View refreshed PayPal data in the dashboard
Navigate to /dashboard/settings -> Disconnect the PayPal account -> Return to settings with PayPal disconnected

features.name: Webhooks
features.description: Processes incoming PayPal and Lemon Squeezy webhook events for real-time financial updates.
user_flows: Send a valid PayPal webhook event to /api/webhooks/paypal -> The event is processed -> Financial data is updated in the system
Send a valid Lemon Squeezy webhook event to /api/webhooks/lemonsqueezy -> The event is processed -> Subscription and invoice data is updated in the system

routes.description: Marketing homepage with hero, stats, features, testimonials, pricing, comparison table
Pricing page with Lemon Squeezy checkout
Dashboard home with KPI grids (Stripe, LS, PayPal)
Analytics with Core, Lemon Squeezy, PayPal tabs (charts, donuts, tables)
Cash flow with Stripe MRR, LS cashflow, PayPal cashflow sections
Settings with Profile, Workspace, Notifications, Security, Integrations tabs
POST - Exchange Plaid public token for access token
POST - Validate and store PayPal credentials

features.name: Marketing Homepage
features.description: Public landing page with hero, animated stats, features grid, testimonials, pricing table
user_interactions: View hero section with animated counters
Scroll through "As Seen On" logos bar

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign up, log in, and session management via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Main dashboard with KPI grids for Stripe, Lemon Squeezy, and PayPal
user_interactions: View revenue KPIs (MRR, Lifetime Revenue, Active Subscriptions)
View PayPal balance and transaction stats
See loading states while data fetches
See error states with retry buttons

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Analytics with tabbed interface (Core, Lemon Squeezy, PayPal) showing charts and data tables
user_interactions: Switch between Core, Lemon Squeezy, and PayPal tabs

features.name: Cash Flow
features.description: Cash flow tracking with Stripe MRR, LS cashflow, and PayPal cashflow sections

features.name: Settings & Integrations
features.description: User settings with profile, workspace, notifications, security, and integration management
user_interactions: Switch between Profile, Workspace, Notifications, Security, Integrations tabs

features.name: Plaid Bank Integration
features.description: Connect bank accounts via Plaid, sync transactions and balances
user_interactions: View connected bank on settings page

features.name: PayPal Business Integration
features.description: Connect PayPal Business account, sync transactions and invoices
user_interactions: Enter PayPal Client ID and Secret

features.name: Webhooks
features.description: Handle incoming webhooks from PayPal and Lemon Squeezy
user_interactions: Receive and process PayPal webhook events (PAYMENT.CAPTURE.COMPLETED, REFUNDED, DENIED)
Receive and process Lemon Squeezy webhook events

known_limitations.issue: Plaid, PayPal, LS, Stripe integrations require valid API keys - tests will fail without real credentials
known_limitations.impact: API-dependent features cannot be tested end-to-end without provider credentials

known_limitations.issue: Webhook endpoints require webhook secret verification - mock data won't pass validation
known_limitations.impact: Direct POST to webhook endpoints will be rejected without valid signature headers

known_limitations.issue: Some dashboard pages depend on Supabase session for auth redirect
